utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates – '2024-09-05 to 2024-09-09' gives exact dates. ✅
3. transportation – includes type (flight), details (budget airline, economy class), and cost (150.0). ✅

5. activities – includes selected activity ('Rock Climbing and Scuba Diving package') and cost (160.0). ✅
6. additional_services – listed as null, meaning none were included, so not fully covered. ❌
7. total_budget – includes total_cost (530.0) and currency (EUR). ✅
Thus, 6 out of 7 items are fully covered.
